heading: Exterior of Capitol
label: 1813 Exterior of Capitol
text: On and after , it shall be the duty of the Architect to clean and keep in proper order the exterior of the Capitol.July 7, 1884
notes: References in TextThe Architect, referred to in text, means the Architect of the Capitol.

CodificationSection was classified to section 163a of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002Section is from the Sundry Civil Appropriation Act , fiscal year 1885.July 7, 1884
